goal: Add a side-effect-free operator decision gate for BPK-077 runtime patch dry-run evidence, accepting explicit approve/defer/reject decisions while keeping execution, patch application, server mutation, route mount, orchestrator, providers, DB, GitHub, writes, packages, workflows, and deployment out of scope.
scope_out: Do not apply patches, mount routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, change packages, or enable execution.
claims: Runtime dry-run evidence can be converted to an operator decision without applying the patch.
Ready BPK-077 evidence and explicit decision refs are required.
Execution and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Approved decision gates only authorize a later task lock, not execution in this task.
dod: Approved, missing decision ref, and rejected or blocked evidence cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route mount, execution, orchestrator, provider, DB, GitHub, write, deployment, package, or workflow changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-077 bundled runtime patch dry-run evidence without applying patches.
